name: Flags SDK
description: Free open-source Vercel library for Next.js and SvelteKit feature flags. Framework-native, provider-agnostic with adapters for LaunchDarkly, Statsig, Optimizely, Hypertune, ConfigCat, DevCycle and Flipt.

seo.title: Flags SDK — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: Flags SDK: Free open-source Vercel library for Next.js and SvelteKit feature flags. Framework-native, provider-agnostic with adapters for LaunchDarkly, Statsig,

when_to_use: Framework-native feature flags for Next.js and SvelteKit
Provider-agnostic adapters for LaunchDarkly and Statsig
Edge-compatible flag evaluation without latency penalty
A/B testing built into Vercel deployment previews

pros: Provider-agnostic with adapters for major flag SaaS
cons: Only a client/framework layer; you still need a provider
Best DX when also hosting on Vercel
Some adapters lag upstream feature parity
review.verdict: Essentially required glue for feature flags in Next.js; pair it with a real flag provider of your choice.
review.best_for: Next.js/SvelteKit teams integrating existing flag SaaS cleanly
review.not_for: Non-Vercel stacks or teams needing the provider itself
